followerSnapshots.notes: Organic growth; no paid promo this week

Full sweep + 2-week comments + A.5 harvest pulse. +8 followers in 3d (organic). +8 connections (7 new people + Katarina Kruspig CREATOR_MODE→CONNECTED). Archived inbox recovered 5 DM responses: Miroslav Tomáš RESPONDED (meeting scheduled Fri 04-24 w/ wife), Monika Schedlbauerová RESPONDED (busy, deferred), Viktória Jakubovičová RESPONDED (times pending), Robert Babela RESPONDED (soft positive), Lucia Cesnakova RESPONDED (demo Wed 04-23 10:00). Oncofiles "3 pacienti" post fully replied to; Miloš Malejčík ethical challenge answered, he committed to DM. Sent new DMs: Miloslava Burikova, Kristína Gomoryová (both Oncofiles T1). Skipped: Anna Kolegová (Swiss Re → HomeGrif too tenuous). Harvest pulse: 145 pending invites (was 150 at Run #7), ~5 accepted in 4 days.
